sourceNote: Pledges sourced from BJP's official 'Bhoroshar Shopoth' manifesto (bjp-govt-wb.pages.dev tracker) and verified against news reports.

pledges.title: Direct Paddy Procurement at MSP
pledges.detail: BJP promised to procure paddy directly from farmers at the Central MSP (₹2,183/quintal for common paddy, FY26) through government agencies, eliminating middlemen and the APMC commission agent layer that depressed farmer receipts under TMC.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Agriculture chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No government order issued yet.
pledges.newsHeadline: ‘Cruel & insulting joke with farmers’: Warring slams Rs 72 MPS hike for paddy - The Times of India
keywords: West Bengal paddy procurement MSP government

pledges.title: ₹6,000/Year Kisan Samman Supplement
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to supplement the Central PM-KISAN ₹6,000/year with a matching state contribution, bringing total direct benefit transfers to enrolled farmers to ₹12,000/year — a doubling of the existing Central scheme.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Agriculture chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No government order issued yet.
keywords: West Bengal PM KISAN state supplement

pledges.title: Irrigation Canal Restoration — North Bengal
pledges.detail: Restore and desilt the Teesta Barrage distribution canals in Jalpaiguri and Cooch Behar — neglected under TMC — to expand irrigation coverage for 3 lakh acres of agricultural land ahead of the kharif season.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 manifesto supplement, North Bengal
pledges.updateNote: No government order issued yet.
pledges.newsHeadline: Hope to Revive Teesta Deal Rekindled as BJP Forms Government in West Bengal - TheWire.in

pledges.title: PM Fasal Bima Yojana — Full State Enrollment
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to enroll all eligible farmers in the Central crop insurance scheme PMFBY within 100 days — TMC had refused to implement it for over a decade, leaving Bengal's 70 lakh farming households without coverage during floods and cyclones. Target: 80 lakh enrollments.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Agriculture chapter)
pledges.updateNote: Reports indicate Bengal likely to re-join PMFBY soon under new government (Financial Express, May 8). No formal enrollment drive or state notification yet issued.
pledges.newsHeadline: West Bengal likely to re-join crop insurance scheme soon - financialexpress.com

pledges.title: Jute Direct Procurement at MSP — JCI Revival
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to revive direct jute procurement through the Jute Corporation of India at declared MSP across Nadia, North 24 Parganas, and Murshidabad — bypassing the trader nexus that suppressed prices for 40 lakh jute farmer families dependent on the crop.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 manifesto supplement, Nadia & Murshidabad
pledges.updateNote: No JCI procurement circular issued by state.

pledges.title: Swastha Saathi 2.0 — Universal Health Cover
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to expand the existing Swastha Saathi health insurance scheme and increase the annual coverage cap from ₹5 lakh to ₹10 lakh per family, while expanding the empanelled hospital network to include private hospitals in district towns.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Health chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No government order issued yet.
pledges.newsHeadline: Bengal BJP Cabinet Portfolios Signal Push For Grassroots Expansion And Welfare-Centric Governance - The Logical Indian

pledges.title: Free Domestic Electricity — 300 Units/Month
pledges.detail: BJP's campaign promise: households consuming up to 300 units/month would pay zero electricity bills — a significant expansion of the existing Central PM-Surya Ghar rooftop solar scheme's free-unit provisions.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 campaign rallies · BJP Bengal electricity manifesto
pledges.updateNote: No government order issued yet.
pledges.newsHeadline: Kejriwal promises free electricity, medical insurance, aid for women if AAP wins Goa polls - The New Indian Express
keywords: West Bengal WBSEDCL free units BJP

pledges.title: Annapurna Bhandar — ₹3,000/Month Direct Cash for Women
pledges.detail: BJP's flagship women's welfare scheme: a direct ₹3,000/month bank transfer via DBT to Aadhaar-linked accounts for all eligible adult women in West Bengal — announced at the state's first cabinet meeting on May 11, 2026. Replaces and significantly expands on the previous administration's Lakshmir Bhandar (₹1,000/month) in both coverage and amount.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · First cabinet meeting, May 11 2026
pledges.updateNote: Officially announced at first cabinet meeting (May 11). Application process begun. Launch date set as June 1, 2026. DBT infrastructure under preparation.
pledges.newsHeadline: What is Annapurna Bhandaar? Bengal BJP govt's Rs 3,000 scheme explained - BusinessToday
keywords: West Bengal women monthly transfer BJP June 2026

pledges.title: Old Pension Scheme — State Employee Restoration
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to restore the Old Pension Scheme (OPS) for West Bengal state government employees, reversing the NPS enrollment that began under TMC. A pension security committee was promised within 30 days.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto · BJP state employees' wing campaign
pledges.updateNote: New government announced a pension payout hike for existing pensioners (May 13) — a goodwill measure for current retirees, not the OPS restoration promised for serving NPS employees. Promised pension security committee not yet constituted.
pledges.newsHeadline: Suvendu Adhikari-led govt to hike pension payouts in Bengal - The Hans India
keywords: Old Pension Scheme West Bengal BJP 2026
Bengal OPS NPS reversal state employees

pledges.title: PDS Ration Card Audit — Eliminate Ghost Beneficiaries
pledges.detail: BJP pledged an Aadhaar-linked audit of all PDS ration cards within 100 days to eliminate duplicate and fake beneficiaries — with genuine BPL families to receive enhanced food entitlements freed by the audit savings.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Food Security chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No audit notification or NIC tender issued.
keywords: PDS ration card audit Bengal BJP 2026
West Bengal ghost beneficiaries ration audit 2026

pledges.title: Dissolve TMC Syndicate Networks — 100-Day Crackdown
pledges.detail: BJP's most-cited promise: a systematic crackdown on the "cut money" and "tolly" collection networks operated by TMC-linked syndicates in construction, sand mining, and public works — with ED and CBI referrals for documented cases.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 manifesto · Suvendu Adhikari repeated public statements
pledges.updateNote: No action announced yet. Post-election violence against TMC workers reported in some districts — separate from syndicate dissolution.
pledges.newsHeadline: From a crackdown on cattle smuggling to border fencing to stop Muslim infiltration, the BJP Govt in West Bengal is moving along the Hindutva line. - Struggle for Hindu Existence

pledges.title: SSC Teacher Regularization — Court-Compliant Scheme
pledges.detail: Devise a scheme to re-employ the ~26,000 teachers dismissed under Supreme Court orders in the SSC recruitment scam — BJP promised a fresh, corruption-free recruitment process with interim employment for those who passed original written tests.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Education chapter) · Supreme Court order reference
pledges.updateNote: No government order issued yet. Supreme Court oversight remains active.

pledges.title: Sandeshkhali — Compensation & FIR Action
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to ensure all complainants from the Sandeshkhali sexual assault and land-grabbing cases receive state support, that all pending FIRs are reinvestigated under new leadership, and that the identified accused face trial.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 campaign material · Sandeshkhali campaign statements
pledges.updateNote: No official action yet.
pledges.newsHeadline: Sandeshkhali (ST) constituency election result 2026 live: Check live updates in West Bengal's Sandeshkhali (ST) - MSN

pledges.title: Narada & Rose Valley — CBI Handover
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to formally hand over all pending Narada sting and Rose Valley chit-fund investigations to the CBI for time-bound completion, removing state police interference that had stalled prosecutions under TMC.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Accountability chapter)
pledges.updateNote: New government granted CBI prosecution consent for SSC scam (May 13) — a positive precedent — but no formal Narada or Rose Valley CBI handover order has been issued yet. Questions around CM Suvendu Adhikari's own legal cases (Mira Bhayander land) raised by opposition.
pledges.newsHeadline: Sanjay Raut slams Suvendu Adhikari’s rise to Bengal CM, raises questions over 254-acre Mira Bhayander land case - The Indian Express
keywords: Rose Valley CBI Bengal new government 2026

pledges.title: Post-Election Violence — Victim Relief & FIR
pledges.detail: Following BJP's election win, widespread reports emerged of retaliatory violence in Murshidabad, Cooch Behar, and South 24 Parganas. BJP pledged that all verified victims would receive state relief, medical aid, and guaranteed FIR registration.
pledges.source: BJP post-election press statements · NHRC reports
pledges.updateNote: DGP directed district police to register all pending complaints (May 16). FIR filed against Abhishek Banerjee (TMC) for inflammatory election remarks. Central observer teams deployed in affected districts. Independent verification of FIR conversion rate and victim relief disbursement still pending.
pledges.newsHeadline: West Bengal police files FIR against Abhishek Banerjee for alleged 'inflammatory' remarks during elections - The New Indian Express
keywords: post election violence Bengal 2026 BJP FIR

pledges.title: Cut-Money Recovery — Jan Adalat Mechanism
pledges.detail: BJP proposed a fast-track "Jan Adalat" (people's court) mechanism to adjudicate and recover the "cut money" extorted by TMC-linked operatives from scheme beneficiaries over 14 years — with recovered funds returned directly to beneficiary accounts.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Accountability chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No Jan Adalat notification or legal framework issued.
keywords: Jan Adalat Bengal BJP cut money 2026

pledges.title: 10 Lakh Government Jobs — 5-Year Plan
pledges.detail: BJP's headline employment pledge: 10 lakh new government and government-linked jobs over 5 years, starting with filling 2 lakh vacancies within the first 100 days by clearing the backlog of qualified applicants from clean recruitment processes.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Employment chapter)
pledges.updateNote: CBI prosecution sanctioned for the SSC teacher recruitment scam (May 13) — a prerequisite for unblocking clean re-recruitment. No formal 2 lakh vacancy recruitment notification issued yet.
pledges.newsHeadline: Bengal's new BJP govt sanctions three cases including teacher recruitment scam for CBI - The Economic Times
keywords: West Bengal 2 lakh jobs BJP 100 days

pledges.title: Tata Motors Return — Singur Industrial Zone
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to convert the Singur land into a dedicated industrial zone for automotive or electronics manufacturing, targeting 15,000 direct jobs as a symbolic reversal of Bengal's industrial retreat.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 campaign speeches · Hooghly district manifesto supplement
pledges.updateNote: No industrial tender or MoU issued yet.

pledges.title: Bengal Global Business Summit — Revamped Format
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to hold a revamped investor summit within 6 months, with binding investment MoUs tracked via actual capital disbursement over 2 years, targeting ₹5 lakh crore in committed investments.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Industry chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No summit date announced.

pledges.title: Leather & Jute Revival — Bantala Complex
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to revive Kolkata's Bantala Leather Complex (3 lakh workers) and the Hooghly–Bhadreshwar jute mill belt through interest subvention loans, modernization grants, and linkage to Central MSME schemes.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Industry chapter) · BJP labour cell, Howrah & Hooghly
pledges.updateNote: No scheme notification or fund release issued.

pledges.title: PMAY Backlog — 10 Lakh Homes in 100 Days
pledges.detail: BJP identified ~10 lakh approved-but-unbuilt PMAY rural housing units stalled by TMC governance failures. The pledge: release withheld funds, complete verification, and ensure physical completion of the backlog within 100 days.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Housing chapter) · Suvendu Adhikari statements
pledges.updateNote: No housing order issued yet.
pledges.newsHeadline: Maharashtra To House Every Homeless Family In 5 Years; CM Devendra Fadnavis Inaugurates 5 Lakh Homes, - Free Press Journal
keywords: West Bengal PMAY backlog BJP 100 days

pledges.title: Kolkata Metro Phase IV — Accelerated Completion
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to accelerate Phase IV (Joka–Esplanade and Noapara–Barasat corridors) by eliminating state government delays in land acquisition and utility shifting — targeting full Phase IV operationalization by 2028.
pledges.source: BJP Kolkata manifesto supplement
pledges.updateNote: No official state order or coordination meeting announced.
pledges.newsHeadline: Can BJP redraw Bengal’s infrastructure map?: Kolkata Port struggles, metro projects stall, Sundarbans remai... - Bhaskar English
keywords: Kolkata Metro Phase IV BJP 2026 land

pledges.title: Ganga River Cleaning — NMG Phase II
pledges.detail: BJP pledged full state cooperation with the National Mission for Clean Ganga Phase II — sewage treatment plants for Howrah, Kolkata's south-bank industrial zones, and 18 municipalities along the Ganga within Bengal's jurisdiction.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Environment chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No state coordination order issued.
pledges.newsHeadline: Genesys International bags NMCG contract for Ganga aerial survey across four states - BusinessLine

pledges.title: Durgapur–Asansol Industrial Corridor — Central MoU
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to sign a tripartite MoU between the state, Central Ministry of Commerce, and DMIC Development Corporation to integrate Durgapur–Asansol into the industrial corridor network — unlocking ₹30,000 crore for the coal-belt's post-mining economic transition.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Infrastructure chapter) · BJP Paschim Burdwan district supplement
pledges.updateNote: No MoU signed; no state–Centre coordination meeting convened.
keywords: Durgapur Asansol industrial corridor BJP 2026 DMIC

pledges.title: Merit-Based IPS/IAS Transfers — End Political Postings
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to end the TMC practice of transferring IAS/IPS officers based on political loyalty, replacing it with a merit and seniority board within 30 days. Officers transferred out of punitive postings under TMC were to be restored. An independent transfer committee to be constituted.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Governance chapter) · BJP state campaign statements
pledges.updateNote: No independent transfer committee constituted yet.
keywords: IPS IAS transfer Bengal BJP merit 2026

pledges.title: 24/7 Anti-Corruption Helpline & Grievance App
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to launch a dedicated 24/7 anti-corruption helpline number and a grievance redressal app within 30 days, allowing citizens to report bribery, extortion, and government delays — with mandatory officer response within 72 hours and public accountability dashboards.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Governance chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No helpline or grievance app launched yet.

pledges.title: RTI Compliance Portal — 30-Day Response Guarantee
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to digitize RTI filing and tracking for all state departments within 100 days, with a mandatory 30-day response SLA and automatic escalation for overdue requests — reversing the near-zero RTI compliance rate under the previous TMC administration.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Transparency chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No RTI portal or compliance order issued.

pledges.title: Aparajita Fast-Track Courts — Crimes Against Women
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to operationalize dedicated Aparajita fast-track courts for crimes against women in all 23 districts within 100 days, with mandatory 60-day trial completion for rape and assault cases — building on the stalled Central fast-track scheme that TMC had under-implemented.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Women's Safety chapter) · Aparajita Act reference
pledges.updateNote: No court notification or judicial appointment order issued.
keywords: Aparajita fast track courts Bengal BJP 2026
West Bengal women safety courts BJP

pledges.title: 100 All-Women Police Stations — 100-Day Target
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to open 100 new all-women police stations (Mahila Thana) statewide, prioritizing districts with high rates of crimes against women including North 24 Parganas, Murshidabad, South 24 Parganas, and Cooch Behar. Each station to have a 24/7 crisis response team.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Women's Safety chapter)
pledges.updateNote: Women’s crisis helpline launched by new government (May 15) — a preliminary measure. Dedicated 100 all-women police station notification not yet issued.
pledges.newsHeadline: Women’s helpline, geo-tagging-based garbage complaint: Here are the latest initiatives of the new BJP government in Bengal - The Indian Express
keywords: all women police station Bengal BJP 2026

pledges.title: Mahila Shakti Kendras — All 341 Blocks
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to operationalize Mahila Shakti Kendras (one-stop crisis support centres) in all 341 blocks of West Bengal within 100 days, providing legal aid, medical support, and counselling for survivors of domestic violence, trafficking, and acid attacks — extending the stalled Central scheme.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Women's Empowerment chapter)
pledges.updateNote: No block-level Mahila Shakti Kendra notification issued.
keywords: Mahila Shakti Kendra Bengal BJP 341 blocks 2026

pledges.title: SSC Fresh Teacher Recruitment — Transparent Merit List
pledges.detail: BJP pledged a clean, OMR-scanned merit-based SSC teacher recruitment process within 100 days to address the 26,000 dismissed teachers and fill ~1.2 lakh vacant teaching posts in state schools — supervised by a judicial committee to prevent recurrence of the scam.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Education chapter) · Supreme Court SSC order reference
pledges.updateNote: New government granted CBI prosecution consent for SSC scam and 2 related cases on May 13 — reversing TMC's stonewalling — enabling trial to advance. Fresh transparent recruitment framework announcement still pending.
pledges.newsHeadline: Bengal's new BJP govt sanctions three cases including teacher recruitment scam for CBI - The Economic Times
keywords: SSC teacher recruitment Bengal BJP 2026 merit
Bengal SSC fresh recruitment 100 days BJP

pledges.title: 10,000 School Infrastructure Upgrades — Classrooms & Toilets
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to upgrade 10,000 state government primary and secondary schools within one year — adding classrooms, functional girls' toilets, drinking water, and electricity — releasing Central Samagra Shiksha funds that TMC had left unutilized for 3 years.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Education chapter) · Samagra Shiksha reference
pledges.deadlineLabel: Plan in 100 days · Full completion in 1 year
pledges.updateNote: No school infrastructure order or Samagra Shiksha fund release issued.
keywords: Samagra Shiksha Bengal BJP fund release 2026

pledges.title: SC/ST/OBC Scholarship Restoration — ₹1,200 Crore Backlog
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to clear the ₹1,200 crore scholarship backlog for SC/ST/OBC students accumulated under TMC — with direct Aadhaar-linked payments within 60 days, restoring Central post-matric scholarship disbursements that had been routed through state agencies and diverted.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Social Justice chapter) · MoSJE scholarship scheme reference
pledges.updateNote: No scholarship disbursement order or Central fund release announced.
keywords: SC ST scholarship Bengal BJP backlog 2026

pledges.title: Yuva Shakti Prakalpa — Rs 3,000/Month for Unemployed Youth
pledges.detail: BJP pledged Rs 3,000/month direct bank transfer to all unemployed youth in West Bengal plus a one-time Rs 15,000 educational grant to help students prepare for competitive examinations — a dual-support approach addressing both immediate income needs and longer-term skill-building.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah Bengal manifesto launch, April 2026
pledges.updateNote: No government order or scheme notification issued yet.
keywords: Yuva Shakti Bengal BJP unemployed youth 3000 2026
West Bengal unemployed youth scheme BJP 2026

pledges.title: DA Arrears — Full Clearance for State Employees
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to clear all pending Dearness Allowance (DA) arrears owed to West Bengal state government employees and pensioners immediately upon assuming power — reversing years of DA underpayment under TMC that left state workers 25–30% below Central DA rates.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah Bengal manifesto launch
pledges.updateNote: Pension payout hike announced (May 13) for existing retirees — a goodwill gesture, but full DA arrears clearance for serving employees not yet ordered.
pledges.newsHeadline: Suvendu Adhikari-led govt to hike pension payouts in Bengal - The Hans India
keywords: DA arrears West Bengal BJP clearance 2026
Bengal state employees Dearness Allowance BJP 2026

pledges.title: 7th Pay Commission — State Implementation in 45 Days
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to formally implement the Central 7th Pay Commission recommendations for West Bengal state government employees within 45 days of forming the government — aligning state pay scales with Central government scales and ending the large pay gap that persisted under TMC.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah Bengal manifesto launch
pledges.updateNote: No formal 7th Pay Commission implementation order issued yet.
keywords: Bengal state employees pay revision BJP 2026

pledges.title: BSF Border Fencing — State Land Transfer in 45 Days
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to immediately transfer all necessary state-owned land to the BSF for comprehensive border fencing along West Bengal's 2,217 km international boundary with Bangladesh — unblocking fencing stalled for a decade by TMC's refusal to cooperate with Central border security agencies.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah manifesto launch
pledges.updateNote: First cabinet meeting (May 11) cleared the transfer of state land to BSF for border fencing — a major step. Physical fencing construction timeline and completion schedule not yet specified.
pledges.newsHeadline: Bengal govt intensifies crackdown on cow smuggling; Suvendu Adhikari cabinet clears BSF fencing land - IBTimes India
keywords: BSF border fencing Bengal BJP 2026 land
West Bengal border fence BSF land transfer 45 days

pledges.title: Uniform Civil Code — 6-Month Implementation
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to enact the Uniform Civil Code (UCC) in West Bengal within 6 months of taking the oath of office — making Bengal the second state (after Uttarakhand) to implement UCC, covering marriage, divorce, inheritance, and adoption laws uniformly regardless of religion.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah Kolkata manifesto launch, April 2026
pledges.updateNote: No UCC draft committee constituted. No legislative timeline or Law Commission reference announced.
keywords: Uniform Civil Code West Bengal BJP 2026 UCC

pledges.title: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY — West Bengal Rollout
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to immediately implement Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY) in West Bengal — which TMC had refused to join for 7 years — providing Rs 5 lakh annual health cover per family to an estimated 2.37 crore eligible Bengali households under the Central scheme's BPL and vulnerable category criteria.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · First cabinet meeting, May 11 2026
pledges.updateNote: First cabinet meeting (May 11) formally approved West Bengal's enrolment in Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY. Hospital empanelment and beneficiary card enrollment process yet to begin formally. Around 2.37 crore families are estimated to benefit.
pledges.newsHeadline: BSF To Fence Bengal Border, Ayushman Bharat Finally Rolled Out: CM Suvendu Adhikari's 6 Big Decisions In First Cabinet Meet - Republic World
keywords: Ayushman Bharat West Bengal BJP 2026 rollout PM-JAY

pledges.title: Free Bus Travel for Women — State Transport from June 1
pledges.detail: BJP pledged free travel for all women on state-owned and state-operated buses across West Bengal from June 1, 2026 — a daily relief measure targeting women commuters, students, and workers who spend a significant share of household income on public transport.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah manifesto launch
pledges.updateNote: Scheme formally announced alongside Annapurna Bhandar with a June 1 start date. State Transport Corporation operational modalities (ticketing, revenue subsidy mechanism) not yet published.
pledges.newsHeadline: Women's helpline, geo-tagging-based garbage complaint: Here are the latest initiatives of the new BJP government in Bengal - The Indian Express
keywords: free bus travel women Bengal BJP 2026
West Bengal women free bus SBSTC 2026

pledges.title: 33% Women's Reservation — All Government Jobs
pledges.detail: BJP pledged 33% horizontal reservation for women across all state government jobs and state police — including all levels of recruitment through SSC, PSC, WBPSC, and direct departmental hiring — to structurally improve women's representation in Bengal's public sector.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah manifesto launch
pledges.updateNote: No gazette notification or recruitment rule amendment issued yet.
keywords: 33% women reservation Bengal BJP government jobs 2026
West Bengal women quota government jobs BJP

pledges.title: Maternity Benefit — Rs 21,000 per Pregnant Mother
pledges.detail: BJP pledged a Rs 21,000 one-time direct bank transfer to every pregnant mother in West Bengal for pre- and post-natal child care — a major expansion of the existing Central PMMVY scheme's Rs 5,000 benefit, providing comprehensive financial support to mothers regardless of birth order.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · BJP4India official statement
pledges.updateNote: No government order or scheme notification issued yet.
keywords: maternity benefit Bengal BJP 21000 pregnant mother 2026

pledges.title: Tea Garden Workers — Land Titles in 100 Days
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to grant land pattas (titles) to all tea garden workers in North Bengal within 100 days, alongside setting up schools and health centres in tea estate areas, guaranteeing minimum wages, and strengthening the Darjeeling tea brand through GI protection enforcement.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah Siliguri rally, April 2026
pledges.updateNote: No land patta distribution scheme or revenue department order issued for tea garden workers.
keywords: tea garden workers land title Bengal BJP 2026
Darjeeling tea estate workers patta BJP 2026

pledges.title: AIIMS, IIT, IIM & Cancer Hospital — North Bengal
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to establish an AIIMS, an IIT, an IIM, and a dedicated cancer hospital in North Bengal — addressing the severe deficit in premier educational and healthcare institutions that has driven the migration of skilled youth out of the region for decades.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah Siliguri rally
pledges.updateNote: No Central Ministry of Education or Health approvals announced for new AIIMS/IIT/IIM sites in North Bengal.
keywords: AIIMS IIT IIM North Bengal BJP 2026
North Bengal higher education BJP institutions 2026

pledges.title: Free HPV Vaccination & Breast Cancer Screening
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to launch a statewide free HPV vaccination programme for adolescent girls (to prevent cervical cancer) and free breast cancer screening camps for women across all 23 districts — integrating both programmes into the National Health Mission's state delivery network.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Health chapter
pledges.updateNote: No health department notification or NHM integration order issued yet.
keywords: breast cancer screening Bengal BJP NHM 2026

pledges.title: End Cattle Smuggling — Zero Tolerance Policy
pledges.detail: BJP pledged zero tolerance on cattle smuggling across Bengal's borders with Bangladesh — coordinated state police and BSF enforcement, dedicated fast-track prosecution of smugglers, and asset seizures targeting the entrenched trafficking network that operated openly under TMC patronage.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah campaign rallies
pledges.updateNote: New government intensified cattle smuggling crackdowns post-formation (May 11–17). First cabinet cleared BSF land fencing which disrupts smuggling corridors. Fast-track prosecution mechanism not yet formally established.
pledges.newsHeadline: Bengal govt intensifies crackdown on cow smuggling; Suvendu Adhikari cabinet clears BSF fencing land - IBTimes India

pledges.title: End Illegal Sand & Coal Mining
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to end illegal sand mining along Bengal's rivers, illegal coal mining in the Raniganj belt, and pollution from unregulated sponge iron units — with revenue from legitimised extraction to fund local employment and environmental restoration programmes.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · BJP Paschim Burdwan district supplement
pledges.updateNote: No mining crackdown order or SIT formation announced.
keywords: illegal coal mining Raniganj Bengal BJP 2026

pledges.title: Age Relaxation — Up to 5 Years for Government Job Aspirants
pledges.detail: BJP pledged up to 5 years of age relaxation in all state government job recruitment processes for candidates who lost opportunities due to the SSC recruitment scam, court-stayed processes, or administrative delays under TMC — compensating applicants for the years lost to a corrupt system.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Youth chapter
pledges.updateNote: No gazette notification or recruitment rule amendment issued yet.
keywords: age relaxation Bengal BJP government jobs 2026
West Bengal recruitment age relaxation 5 years BJP

pledges.title: Detect, Delete & Deport — Illegal Infiltration Drive
pledges.detail: BJP pledged to implement a systematic 'detect, delete and deport' mechanism to identify and expel all illegal infiltrators from West Bengal — beginning with an Aadhaar-voter roll cross-check, followed by state database creation in coordination with Central agencies and BSF.
pledges.source: BJP 2026 Manifesto (Bhoroshar Shopoth) · Amit Shah Kolkata manifesto launch
pledges.updateNote: No state-level NRC exercise or voter roll audit initiated yet. Border fencing land transfer — a key prerequisite — cleared at first cabinet on May 11.
pledges.newsHeadline: From a crackdown on cattle smuggling to border fencing to stop Muslim infiltration, the BJP Govt in West Bengal is moving along the Hindutva line - Struggle for Hindu Existence
